custody_adjustment.warning_message: Florida uses a different 'gross-up' worksheet when the paying parent has more than 73 overnights/year (20%+ timesharing) — this calculator's standard result does not apply. Use Florida's official Form 12.902(e) Child Support Guidelines Worksheet for a substantial-timesharing calculation.

deviation_note: Courts may deviate from the guideline amount for documented reasons (extraordinary medical or educational expenses, seasonal income variation, etc.) — this calculator shows the presumptive guideline amount only, not a court order.
